description: ObjectReference contains enough information to locate the referenced object inside current cluster.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion represents the API version of the referent.

kind.description: Kind represents the Kind of the referent.

name.description: Name represents the name of the referent.

namespace.description: Namespace represents the namespace for the referent. For non-namespace scoped resources(e.g. 'ClusterRole')，do not need specify Namespace, and for namespace scoped resources, Namespace is required. If Namespace is not specified, means the resource is non-namespace scoped.

resourceVersion.description: ResourceVersion represents the internal version of the referenced object, that can be used by clients to determine when object has changed.
